access.anon: Can only perform public browsing and pre-sign-in guidance actions.
access.user: Cannot modify schedules or exams; can only manage personal state such as homework completion status and todos.
access.admin: Has governance entries but this does not change the information hierarchy logic on ordinary detail pages.
access.agent: Can receive more structured fields but should not produce a second product model as a result.

rules.name-first: Users first identify by name, not by code.
rules.codes-for-disambiguation: Codes, semesters, and numbers primarily serve disambiguation and retrieval.
rules.internal-ids-hidden: jwId, database id, and other internal identifiers are not directly displayed in ordinary UI by default.
